title: Combine to Single Page
metaDescription: Stitch PDF pages into one continuous page. Create scrollable single-page documents.
description:
Combine to Single Page stitches all PDF pages into one continuous page. Create scrollable documents perfect for web viewing or continuous reading.

Pages are joined vertically with customizable spacing. The result is a single long page containing all content.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Set Spacing
howToUse.description: Choose the gap between stitched pages.

howToUse.title: Combine and Download
howToUse.description: Click Combine to create the single-page PDF.

useCases.title: Web Documents
useCases.description: Create scrollable PDFs for web embedding.

useCases.title: Continuous Reading
useCases.description: Convert paginated documents to continuous scroll.

useCases.title: Long-Form Content
useCases.description: Combine pages for seamless long-form reading.

faq.question: Is there a page limit?
faq.answer: Very long documents may be limited by browser memory.

faq.question: Can I add separators between pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add spacing or lines between original pages.

faq.question: Will this work for printing?
faq.answer: The result is best for screen viewing; use N-Up for print layouts.
